FLOW.COMMENT: vfSessionSetStatus - set the current status of the session

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: z_updateActiveStatus - set the current status of the transaction
Note that this service does not act on both tables together in a transaction. This is because we don't want a
failure on the TFW_TRANS_STEPS table to prevent the transaction from continuing.
2/1/21 - modified to convert the status from FAILED to ABANDONED if we are accepting content (meaning we have no legitimate content and cannot resume)
4/22/24 - modified to return the WORKFLOW_NAME field as wfName

INVOKE.COMMENT: replace single quotes ' with two single quotes '' so they are escaped

MAP.COMMENT: SELECT STATUS,WORKFLOW_NAME FROM TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

Values.value: SELECT STATUS,WORKFLOW_NAME FROM TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

BRANCH.COMMENT: if new status=FAILED and the current status=ACCEPTING, then change the status to ABANDONED

INVOKE.COMMENT: Warning: Transaction FAILED while accepting content, status converted to ABANDONED

Values.value: Warning: Transaction FAILED while accepting content, status converted to ABANDONED

INVOKE.COMMENT: Setting transaction status to %sStatus%, message to '%sStatusMessage%'

Values.value: Setting transaction status to %sStatus%, message to '%sStatusMessage%'

MAP.COMMENT: UPDATE TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE SET STATUS='%sStatus%', STATUS_MESSAGE='%sQuotedMsg%', STATUS_DATE=to_char(SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZR') WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

Values.value: UPDATE TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE SET STATUS='%sStatus%', STATUS_MESSAGE='%sQuotedMsg%', STATUS_DATE=to_char(SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZR') WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

INVOKE.NAME: sRows <> 1
INVOKE.COMMENT: Warning: unable to update TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE, sRows='%sRows%'

Values.value: Warning: unable to update TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE, sRows='%sRows%'

MAP.COMMENT: INSERT INTO TFW_TRANS_STEPS SELECT '%sFwTransactionid%', TRANSACTION_STEPS_SEQ.NEXTVAL, ..., CURRENT_WORKFLOW_STEP,... FROM TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

Values.value: INSERT INTO TFW_TRANS_STEPS SELECT '%sFwTransactionid%', TRANSACTION_STEPS_SEQ.NEXTVAL, '%instanceSpec%', '%sTid%', to_char(SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZR'), CURRENT_WORKFLOW_STEP, '%sStatus%', '%sQuotedMsg%' FROM TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

INVOKE.NAME: sRows <> 1
INVOKE.COMMENT: Warning: unable to insert into TFW_TRANS_STEPS, sRows='%sRows%'

Values.value: Warning: unable to insert into TFW_TRANS_STEPS, sRows='%sRows%'
